home.subtitle: Rumabi Study connects notes, study groups, events and schedules in one smart platform built for university students.
home.searchPlaceholder: What do you want to organize today?
home.featuresTitle: Built for every part of your academic life
home.f1desc: Organize tasks, schedules and weekly goals effortlessly.
home.f2desc: Access notes and resources shared across the community.
home.f3desc: Connect with students from your major and beyond.
home.f4desc: Never miss a campus activity, fair or conference.
home.f5desc: Explore universities worldwide through our built-in API.

footer.tagline: The academic platform of the future, built for real students.
